package rulecoverage

func NegativeInconsistentPackageName() string {
    ruleID := "inconsistent_package_name"
    family := "style"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Directories that mix base Go package names after ignoring the _test suffix."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
